topic: Gisele Pelicot Google Trends spike Feb 2026
summary: Massive spike driven by memoir launch Feb 17 and media blitz Feb 12-15. Peak at 100 on Feb 15. Baseline is 0-4. Post-spike decay to baseline expected within 1-2 weeks.
content: Current spike: Feb 12=12, Feb 13=55, Feb 14=69, Feb 15=100 (peak), Feb 16=55, Feb 17=67. Driven by memoir "A Hymn to Life" publication on Feb 17, BBC Newsnight interview Feb 12, AFP interview Feb 15, NPR Feb 15. Baseline for this term is 0-4 in the US. Historical 12-month data shows only one other mini-spike (Oct 5, 2025 at 11, back to 3 the next week). Resolution compares Feb 26 vs Feb 17 in date range Jan 27-Feb 26. Feb 17 value ~60-67, Feb 26 expected to be 0-10 given standard post-spike decay. Decrease is overwhelmingly likely.
